ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "task" TEXT /* Task that the model is designed to perform (e.g., sentiment analysis, text classification) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training the model */,
  "training_start_date" TEXT /* Date when model training started */,
  "training_end_date" TEXT /* Date when model training ended */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Model architecture (e.g., LSTM, Transformer) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for training */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in records */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Preprocessing steps applied to the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., text, audio, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stage */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score metric of the model */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process for the specific metric */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss metric */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score for binary classification tasks */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., Train, Val) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stage in the model development process */,
  "stage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., no noise, ngrams) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_order" INTEGER /* Order of the condition */,
  "condition_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last active date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
